The Owner Intelligence
Scorecard

Find out where your program stands across the five pillars that determine whether you're in control of your capital program — or reacting to it. No email required to see your results.

01
Mission

What you're actually trying to accomplish — documented, not assumed.

02
Money

Real markups, real contingency — an owner-controlled budget, not a guess.

03
Team

Clear ownership and documented process — so nothing stalls waiting on one person.

04
Gameplan

A sequence pressure-tested against funding, timelines, and the calendar.

05
Story

Consistent communication that keeps public trust ahead of program complexity.

Free. No signup. Your results are yours to email or download at the end.
